mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qp_rule_entity (version_id, entity_text, entity_type, normalized_value, aliases_json, attributes_json, relations_json, ids_json, enabled, created_at, updated_at) SELECT #{newVersionId}, entity_text, entity_type, normalized_value, aliases_json, attributes_json, relations_json, ids_json, enabled, NOW(), NOW() FROM qp_rule_entity WHERE version_id = #{baseVersionId}
